name: koishi-plugin-ll-keyword-reply
description: Flexible keyword-auto-reply with regex, per-group, weekday scheduling

description.zh: 关键词自动回复插件。支持正则/包含匹配、同关键词不同群不同回复、星期调度、图片回复，控制台数据库表格管理+命令管理。
description.en: Keyword auto-reply. Regex/contains, per-group overrides, weekday schedule, DB table + commands.
